mapper.sql: a.*, b.realname as `user.realname`, (select count(*) from biz_department s WHERE s.parent_id=a.id) as hasChildren
left join sys_user b on b.id = a.manager
mapper.update:
update biz_department set parent_ids= CONCAT(#{newParentIds},
substring(parent_ids, length(#{oldParentIds})+1,length(parent_ids)+1))
substring(parent_ids, len(#{oldParentIds})+1,len(parent_ids)+1))
where parent_ids like concat(#{oldParentIds}, '%')
mapper.delete: delete from biz_department where parent_ids like concat(#{oldParentIds}, '%')
